name: Grilled Langoustines with Garlic Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a stovetop grill pan over medium-high heat for at least 5 minutes until very hot.
2. In a small bowl, combine butter, garlic, parsley, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Beat until well mixed.
3. Brush the langoustines with the garlic butter.
4. Grill, basting several times and turning once, until cooked through.
